prompt: Quick AGENTS.md update — we found out that running `cargo clippy --all-targets` before pushing catches most CI failures, and that the integration tests need Docker running. Don't need a big reorg, just add the learnings.

assertions.text: The updated AGENTS.md includes guidance about running `cargo clippy --all-targets` before pushing
The updated AGENTS.md includes guidance that integration tests need Docker running
The file structure was NOT reorganized into multiple files — only the existing AGENTS.md was updated with new learnings
Existing content (project description, build commands, style rules) is preserved, not removed or substantially rewritten
New additions are concise (one-liners or short entries), not verbose multi-paragraph explanations
